scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=$API_SERVER_PORT pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:web: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=$VITE_PORT pnpm --filter @workspace/hypespace run dev
scripts.dev: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:push && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
